testcase.classname: Deployment Smoke Tests API Service Health check should return 200
testcase.name: Deployment Smoke Tests API Service Health check should return 200

testcase.classname: Deployment Smoke Tests API Service GET /api/problems should return 200
testcase.name: Deployment Smoke Tests API Service GET /api/problems should return 200

testcase.classname: Deployment Smoke Tests API Service GET /api/contests should return 200
testcase.name: Deployment Smoke Tests API Service GET /api/contests should return 200

testcase.classname: Deployment Smoke Tests API Service Invalid route should return 404
testcase.name: Deployment Smoke Tests API Service Invalid route should return 404

testcase.classname: Deployment Smoke Tests Execution Service Health check should return 200
testcase.name: Deployment Smoke Tests Execution Service Health check should return 200

testcase.classname: Deployment Smoke Tests Execution Service Submit Python code should return 201 with verdict
testcase.name: Deployment Smoke Tests Execution Service Submit Python code should return 201 with verdict

testcase.classname: Deployment Smoke Tests Execution Service Submit code with wrong answer should return verdict with details
testcase.name: Deployment Smoke Tests Execution Service Submit code with wrong answer should return verdict with details

testcase.classname: Deployment Smoke Tests Execution Service Submit with missing fields should return 400
testcase.name: Deployment Smoke Tests Execution Service Submit with missing fields should return 400

testcase.classname: Deployment Smoke Tests Execution Service Submit with invalid language should return 400
testcase.name: Deployment Smoke Tests Execution Service Submit with invalid language should return 400

testcase.classname: Deployment Smoke Tests Execution Service Invalid route should return 404
testcase.name: Deployment Smoke Tests Execution Service Invalid route should return 404

testcase.classname: Deployment Smoke Tests Cross-Service Communication API service EXECUTION_SERVICE_URL should be reachable
testcase.name: Deployment Smoke Tests Cross-Service Communication API service EXECUTION_SERVICE_URL should be reachable
